narrative:
Hardy township has 3,259 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.2 percentage points.
